title: terpsichore longa
intro: Terpsichore longa, also known as Copaiba tree or Copaiba oil tree, is a plant species native to South America, belonging to the family Meliaceae. The plant's resin, particularly Copaiba oil, has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of beta-caryophyllene. The health benefits of Copaiba oil include reducing pain and inflammation, improving skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and supporting immune function. Copaiba oil is typically prepared through steam distillation of the plant's resin and can be found in various herbal preparations, including capsules, tinctures, and topical creams.
